title: Agent Forensics v24
claim: Polylogue can regenerate a current v24 longitudinal agent-usage forensics packet over the live archive using product analysis surfaces, with provenance-separated token/cost lanes and explicit physical-vs-logical token grains.
non_claim: This packet is not provider billing truth, not an LLM judgment of failure follow-up behavior, and not a resurrected standalone forensics script; it reads the current archive through product commands and points structured-failure follow-up to the current claim-vs-evidence packet.
usage_headline_caveats: provider usage events, transcript text volume, and model rollups are separate evidence streams
this report does not query provider billing and is not a precise cost report
headline detail computes session/source/model-rollup totals only; run with detail='full' for provider-event, cumulative, sample, and stale-rollup diagnostics

command_proofs.usage_claude_code: POLYLOGUE_ARCHIVE_ROOT=/home/sinity/.local/share/polylogue polylogue --plain analyze usage --detail headline --origin claude-code-session --format json --limit 0
command_proofs.usage_codex: POLYLOGUE_ARCHIVE_ROOT=/home/sinity/.local/share/polylogue polylogue --plain analyze usage --detail headline --origin codex-session --format json --limit 0
command_proofs.coverage_origin: POLYLOGUE_ARCHIVE_ROOT=/home/sinity/.local/share/polylogue polylogue --plain analyze insights coverage --group-by origin --format json --limit 1000
command_proofs.usage_timeline: POLYLOGUE_ARCHIVE_ROOT=/home/sinity/.local/share/polylogue polylogue --plain analyze insights usage-timeline --group-by month-origin-model --format json --limit 500

cost_rollups_performance.impact: The v24 packet uses analyze usage headline cost/pricing lanes for current cost claims; cost-rollups drilldown should be optimized or bounded before being used as a cold-reader proof.
